title: Eggo Cards
description: Lots of different Cards that give you different abilities.
body:
# 🥚Eggo Cards🃏

This mod adds **54** different "Eggo" Cards.
Most of them have a **special ability**, ranging from **basic effects** to **saving you from death**. The rest are simply... collection cards.

In order for the cards to have any effect, you need to have the **Egger's book** in your inventory.

## Card Shredder🪚:
- Put **cards** inside to turn them into **card dust**

## Reggconstructor🥚:
- Makes **special cards** using **card dust**, **eggs**, and **a specific item** *Recipes below*
- _Needs a heat source (campfire, magma, fire, etc.) under the Pot to work!_

# 📦Card Packs📦
## Neutral Pack:
![NeutralPack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25f8a68bccdc90ab139960e97cad1069a4274cc6.png)
- Has **4-6** Neutral Cards inside.
- Can be found in **villages**.

## Dark Pack:
![DarkPack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ff4ed754bb368d2d3a5a3b7eee1137784128f5b.png)
- Has **4-6** Dark Cards inside.
- Can be found in **mineshafts, igloos, spawners, jungle temples and pillager outposts**.

## Burnt Pack:
![BurntPack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ff502bfb9b8183d0bb1e76edbf04bcbb20af498.png)
- Has **3-5** Burnt Cards inside.
- Can be found in **bastions and nether fortresses**.

## Remain Pack:
![Remainpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9968c2d3e917450dffdb4e87aa9699e27ea3fc9.png)
- Has **3-6** Remain Cards inside
- Can be found in **end cities**.

# 🃏The Cards🃏:

## Neutral Cards☀️:
![speedcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9386e73083a97ce2f4dcf8e89cc8e89d084e731e.png)
**FastEgg** - Grants **Speed I**.

![resistancecard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a6462d3c2135b43572dc19208394c9d86297903.png)
**Hard Shell** - Grants **Resistance I**.

![strengthcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e099675e631c4b273c257040724605cc593d164.png)
**Boiled** - Grants **Strength I**.

![photosynthesiscard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6869476e3138f25c2e01527215a16f89114f0a1b.png)
**Photosynthesis** - Feeds **one food point** every **60 seconds** during the day.

![magnetcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69ddb40c042fe9abb0dab5760e85019ca526330d.png)
**Magnetic Egg** - Slowly pulls **items** in a **5 block range** to you.

![farmercard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f7044588d0d87f4ffe3bfb880d4d9bb3798d38b.png)
**Farmer** - Stops you from trampling a farmland.

![cowardcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e142678ff808608c308cb01e657fe00bff13408.png)
**Coward** - When **below 3 hearts**, grants **Speed III** for **3 seconds**. **[Cooldown: 60 seconds]**.

![sonarcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8557f6b1492712fa0721592ceed1eca4b0d1b18.png)
**Sonar** - If there's **Gold ore** or **Diamond ore** in a **6 block radius**, emits a **chime** every **15 seconds**.

## Dark Cards🌕:
![nightvisioncard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2204ffcae5a2e96b935f461f6d0d6103975175f.png)
**Egg Vision** - Grants **Night Vision** during the night.

![clumsycard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef2db1ed5c77e2ab87c06970b27784a3822632a7.png)
**Clumsy Egg** - Every hit, **3% chance** that **enemy drops weapon**, but **0.25% chance** that **you do**.

![diamondstomachcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e21f72c89ee360f8af2db0b7501fc8b36003a50c.png)
**Diamond Stomach** - Lets you eat **rotten flesh** and **spider eyes** without having any effect on you.

![nightshiftcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c18db8cbb20e1a42c0d2fe565f12d69fdb487416.png)
**Night Shift** - Grants **Haste** during the night, but works only **outside**.


![parasitecard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf9cd96e48995911e8c746c33757a0083797d954.png)
**Parasite Egg** - **30% chance** to **suck XP** out of attacked **player**. *Some of the XP gets lost*.

![windejectcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcef1f4bbfd20ec29fa9a0fe7e2bdbb4da87fe1f.png)
**Wind Eject** - While **sneaking**, you **jump higher**. *Can be combined, more on that later*.

![metaleggcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0baaa0ad07c990d27e04a2dc48e0e53101b4ac28.png)
**Metal Egg** - When hitting the ground from **>5 blocks**, you smash into it **dealing damage to others**.

![vampireeggcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f12fb4ecff947c1dc953d5d1117f1d1825127c8.png)
**Vampire** - **40% chance** that you get **Regeneration II** for **3 seconds** after a **kill**.

## Burnt Cards🔥:
![glowstoneauracard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0975193eb7c89436a02e3731890537acbf8cba25.png)
**Glowstone Aura** - Enemies that you hit start **glowing**.

![hoteggcare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b27794b7cda4d1908eb8b4602d09d4bc3820f212.png)
**Hot Egg** - Enemies that you hit start **burning**.

![infernotouchcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/294a9987d51fca387ed79e16c13f3ac4bc5dd7a9.png)
**Inferno Touch** - When you **mine** any **gold ore**, it **auto-smelts**. *Supports Fortune*.

![firebreathcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96768e4880fcdbb2a575a745df579dfcc47b5ac2.png)
**Fire Breath** - Press *default* **K**, to **emit a fire trail** with a **5 block** radius.

![basalteggcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a888ef8490c81b4c343f6a46ac1af55ac7ff50d.png)
**Basalt Egg** - You are **completely immune** to **knockback**.

![shieldofgoldcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d037a384f059d322b25e3617ecb4ce6a4679b563.png)
**Shield of gold** - If below **4 hearts**, absorbs **Gold** from you instead of HP. **[Cooldown: 60 seconds]**

## Remain Cards💫:
![endereggshieldcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0b773ba9065bdd9e20e35eb7bbbdbcd64ba103a.png)
**Enderegg Shield** - **Arrows** cannot hit you.

![eggchestcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b144d8f1071b1665371ec03cb665831259e18307.png)
**Eggchest** - Press *default* **J** to open your **enderchest** from **anywhere**.

![laserarrowscard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4e9b66e9b75b343406cb85424780fece77369df.png)
**Laser Arrow** - **Arrows** that you shoot have **absolutely no gravity**.

![flyflyawaycard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4108041f1c4da45e621cb8d93384edfb85067c55.png)
**Fly, fly away** - When you get hit, your enemy has **3% chance** to get **Levitation III** for **2 seconds**

![starejectcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f28cbafd41b1939893ca5aede71db3da3d1a5b6.png)
**Star Eject** - **Better** version of **Wind Eject**, Equip **both** for **even better** effect and **no fall damage**

![exchangecard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b035ff38db71c7b07ab79bc64888c7303eddb6ef.png)
**Exchange** - Press *default* **H** to **change places** with the **last entity you hit**. **[Cooldown: 30 seconds]**

![voidrepelcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b5c304266f67bc83f90a252e5c7ea04ee433a1c.png)
**Void Repel** - If you **fall into the void**, you get **pushed back up**. **[Cooldown: 3 minutes]**

## Special Cards⭐:
![woodencard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58292c922bf5a6866262a0a702ffcb57e0f5a534.png)
**Wooden Egg** - Alternate version of **Sonar** for **chests/barrels**. *(Lootr compatible)*
**Recipe:** 
- **1x** Bamboo Chest Raft,
- **5x** Neutral Card Dust,
- **2x** Dark Card Dust,
- **1x** Burnt Card Dust,
- **0x** Remain Card Dust

![overgrowncard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/511a75cd5ef7309ea8e1af15a41b1aef4879e97c.png)
**Overgrown Egg** - Applies **bone meal** in **5x5 range** on *keybind**. **[Cooldown: 30 seconds]**
**Recipe:** 
- **1x** Flowering Azalea Leaves,
- **5x** Neutral Card Dust,
- **5x** Dark Card Dust,
- **1x** Burnt Card Dust,
- **0x** Remain Card Dust

![soakedcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/241aa96424cccedcc4096e2dc06909f630be854d.png)
**Soaked Egg** - Grants **Water breathing** and **Haste** underwater.
**Recipe:** 
- **1x** Lily Pad,
- **8x** Neutral Card Dust,
- **5x** Dark Card Dust,
- **0x** Burnt Card Dust,
- **0x** Remain Card Dust

![wolfcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4e2889074fd6c6a9f67485de42f247f281f74d9.png)
**Wolf Egg** - Grants **Strength** and **Speed** at night. *Overworld only*.
**Recipe:** 
- **1x** Bone Block,
- **5x** Neutral Card Dust,
- **10x** Dark Card Dust,
- **2x** Burnt Card Dust,
- **1x** Remain Card Dust

![frostbittencard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b7e57cfa5372e88cff5055e0485637f4ae12703.png)
**Frostbitten Egg** - Applies **Slowness IV** to entites around you on *keybind*. **[Cooldown: 60 seconds]**
**Recipe:** 
- **1x** Powder Snow Bucket,
- **8x** Neutral Card Dust,
- **8x** Dark Card Dust,
- **0x** Burnt Card Dust,
- **0x** Remain Card Dust

![turbinecard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/919eca5501d04f6625c4400a1b54d6c2fc58e4e1.png)
**Turbine Egg** - Pushes you **forward** on *keybind* draining **3 hunger**. **[Cooldown: 5 seconds]**
**Recipe:** 
- **1x** Calibrated Sculk Sensor,
- **10x** Neutral Card Dust,
- **3x** Dark Card Dust,
- **3x** Burnt Card Dust,
- **2x** Remain Card Dust

![vipcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fa1e8abf55ac318527abac52d588b2ba8c5b440.png)
**Vip Egg** - Grants **Hero of the village III**.
**Recipe:** 
- **1x** Enchanted Golden Apple,
- **10x** Neutral Card Dust,
- **5x** Dark Card Dust,
- **3x** Burnt Card Dust,
- **2x** Remain Card Dust

![astralcard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d661c4fb3fa0969d4e462b55af0257f5cdcbf21f.png)
**Astral Card** - **Teleports** you to **your respawn point**. **[Cooldown: 10 minutes]**
**Recipe:** 
- **1x** Totem Of Undying,
- **5x** Neutral Card Dust,
- **10x** Dark Card Dust,
- **5x** Burnt Card Dust,
- **10x** Remain Card Dust


## Augments⬆️:
**Senses**:
Boosts:
- Sonar - triggers every 10s.
- Wooden Egg - range +2 blocks.
- Glowstone Aura - lasts 7.5s longer.
<details><summary>How to get:</summary>Can be found in the **eggo-house structure**, *randomly generated*</details>

**Momentum**:
- Fast Egg - grants Speed II.
- Metal Egg - no longer deals bonus fall damage.
- Turbine - cooldown reduced by 1s.
<details><summary>How to get:</summary>Can be **crafted**, use JEI :3</details>

**Predator**:
- Coward - boost lasts 2s longer.
- Parasite - suck XP chance boosted to 45%.
- Clumsy - enemy drop chance boosted to 5%.
- Vampire - regeneration lasts 2s longer.
<details><summary>How to get:</summary>Rare drop from **Zoglins** *Around 1/250*</details>

**Nature's Rhythm**:
- Photosynthesis - feeds you every 20s.
- Night Shift - works indoors.
- Overgrown - covers 7x7 area.
<details><summary>How to get:</summary>Rare **fishing** treasure</details>

**Elemental**:
- Soaked - grants Dolphin's Grace.
- Frostbitten - applies Slowness IV.
- Hot Egg - no longer puts card user on fire.
<details><summary>How to get:</summary>Inside **buried treasure** chests</details>

**Trickster**:
- Exchange - range +10 blocks.
- Fly, Fly Away - chance for enemy to fly boosted to 8%.
- Wind Eject / Star Eject - jump even higher.
<details><summary>How to get:</summary>Chance to drop when **TNT** blows up a **Bell** *Item form only!*</details>

**Survivor**:
- Void Repel - cooldown reduced to 90s.
- Shield of Gold - new absorbed gold formula: **Damage * 1.1**.
- Astral Egg - cooldown reduced to 5min.
- Hard Shell - grants Resistance II.
- Wolf Egg - works in all dimensions.
<details><summary>How to get:</summary>
Requires **building** a **small structure**:
- **Emerald block** in the middle,
- **Diamond blocks** on four sides of the emerald block *north, south, east, west*,
- **Stone button** on top of the emerald block,
- **Chests** on top of diamond blocks,
- **Any Augment** in the middle slot of every chest
- **Press the button** and watch the magic happen!
</details>
